subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who ordaineth through His decree, manifesteth trials through His command, and thereby exalteth His Cause in the kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی حکم بالقضاء و اظهر البلاء بالامضاء و به رفع امره فیملکوت
